title: Genstat programs for summary tables from RBD and lattice designs
abstract: Data sets from multilocational trials have to be processed as soon after the growing season as possible to allow genotypic assessment over environments. Forming two-way tables with margins of each variable allows this assessment. Since randomized  block and lattice designs are often used at ICRISAT Center and West African centers, programs for these designs have been developed for producing summary tables...
